brief_notes: Reasonably well-written with most key statistics reported in the text, but tables are less detailed than the skill version. The manipulation checks table omits SDs and cotinine/CO values. The regions comparison table uses qualitative descriptors. PPI results are described in text without a dedicated quantitative table. Participant table is adequate. The introduction provides good theoretical framing. Overall a competent paper but lacks the quantitative precision expected for an fMRI study of this nature.
